# Loewen Property Works Inc.

> Professional landscaping, snow removal, and property maintenance services in Kitchener, Waterloo, and Cambridge, Ontario, Canada.

## About

Loewen Property Works Inc. is a local property care company serving the Waterloo Region in Ontario, Canada. Founded and operated by Rob Loewen, the company provides personalized outdoor and indoor property services to residential and commercial clients in Kitchener, Waterloo, Cambridge, and surrounding areas.

- Phone: (519) 588-2264
- Email: robl@loewenpropertyworks.ca
- Service Area: Kitchener, Waterloo, Cambridge, and Waterloo Region, Ontario
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM

## Services

Loewen Property Works offers the following services:

- **Landscaping**: Brush clearing, tree cutting, pruning, sodding/seeding, flower and shrub bed preparation, grass cutting, leaf cleanups, general yard cleanups
- **Snow Removal**: Residential and commercial snow clearing
- **Property Maintenance**: Painting, demolition, junk sorting, hardwood floor refinishing, cleaning, handyman repairs
- **Hydro Connection Digs**: Utility connection excavation work

## Products

- **Solar-Powered Starburst Stake Lights**: Multi-coloured solar-powered yard lights with multiple flashing patterns and steady-on mode. $12 for a single light or $20 for a box of two. Best used April through September.
- **Canada Forever T-Shirts**: 100% cotton black t-shirts. Available in 2XL and 4XL (runs small). $15 per shirt or $25 for two.

Products available for local delivery in Kitchener-Waterloo or shipping (shipping cost + $5). Payment by e-transfer to robl@loewenpropertyworks.ca.

- [Homepage](https://loewenpropertyworks.ca/): Overview, testimonials, key services

- [Products](https://loewenpropertyworks.ca/products.html): Solar yard lights and Canada Forever t-shirts for sale
- [About Us](https://loewenpropertyworks.ca/about-us.html): Company background and proprietor information
- [Contact Us](https://loewenpropertyworks.ca/contact-us.html): Contact form, phone, email, and Google Maps location
